title: JustTimm's Lightsaber Workshop
description: This is a resource pack that brings the iconic sabers from across the Star Wars galaxy to life in Minecraft utilizing OptiFine CIT (1.20.2-1.21.4) and Vanilla CIT (1.21.5+).
body:
![Header](https://i.imgur.com/xL1HSgi.png) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/HVjHFmDU?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1BD96A&labelColor=494B54&color=1BD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-lightsaber-workshop) [![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/HVjHFmDU?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=494B54&color=1BD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-lightsaber-workshop) [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&label=YouTube&labelColor=494B54&color=FF0033)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ) [![TikTok](https://img.shields.io/badge/TikTok-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=tiktok&logoColor=white)](https://www.tiktok.com/@justtimms_resource_packs) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/738674569195290734?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&labelColor=494B54&color=5865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/runTSv2) **JustTimm's Lightsaber Workshop** is a resource pack that brings the iconic lightsabers from across the Star Wars galaxy to life in Minecraft, utilizing OptiFine CIT _(1.20.2–1.21.4)_ and Vanilla CIT _(1.21.5+)_. This pack introduces a wide variety of lightsabers, designed to resemble the real thing while maintaining a vanilla-like aesthetic. Explore the galaxy's most legendary weapons by downloading JustTimm's Lightsaber Workshop, available on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-lightsaber-workshop) and [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/justtimm-s-lightsaber-workshop-5845496/)! #### **NOTE**: Don't join a 1.21.5+ world in 1.20.2-1.21.4 where you used this resource pack because all lightsabers will lose their name and you will need to rename them again. ## ⚔️Lightsabers [![Unique Lightsaber Hilts](https://img.shields.io/badge/60-0?style=for-the-badge&label=Unique%20Lightsaber%20hilts&labelColor=434956&color=17b85a)](https://github.com/JustTimmsAdditions/justtimms_lightsaber_workshop_doc/wiki)
[![Button](https://imgur.com/na1PxRP.png)](https://github.com/JustTimmsAdditions/justtimms_lightsaber_workshop_doc/wiki)
❓How does it work? If you want to get one of our custom items you need to get yourself an anvil and the required item. ***Example**: You want to get Luke Skywalker’s green lightsaber. To do this, You need to place any item listed [here](https://github.com/JustTimmsAdditions/justtimms_lightsaber_workshop_doc/wiki#%EF%B8%8F-compatible-items) in the first slot and then rename it—making sure to look up the correct name in the [documentation](https://github.com/JustTimmsAdditions/justtimms_lightsaber_workshop_doc/wiki/%E2%9A%94%EF%B8%8F-Lightsaber-List). No enchantment is required.*
⚙️Recommended settings (When using OptiFine) Video Settings -> Quality... - Custom Items: **ON** - Emissive Textures: **ON** Video Settings -> Animations... - Terrain Animated: **ON**

--- ## ⚙️ Mod Support This resource pack also has support for the following mods: | Mod | 1.20.2-1.21.4 | 1.21.5-26.1.2 | 26.2 | |:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:| | [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) | ❌ | ✅ | ❌ | You can find more information [here](https://github.com/JustTimmsAdditions/justtimms_lightsaber_workshop_doc/wiki/%E2%9A%99%EF%B8%8F-Respackopts)! --- ## ✨ Recommended Projects To get the most immersive lightsaber experience, consider pairing this resource pack with the following mods, resource packs and maps:
🔧 Mods - [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) by ZsoltMolnarrr - [Locomotion](https://github.com/Trainguy9512/locomotion/releases) by Trainguy9512 _(Playtesting)_ - [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) by HiWord9 - [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) by JFronny
🎨 Resource packs - [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension) by FreshLX - [Cresh: A Star Wars UI Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cresh) by Sindavar - [Fishy's Astromech Wolves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/astromech-wolves) by Fishysalmon02
🗺️ Maps - [STAR WARS Coruscant Jedi Temple](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/star-wars-coruscant-jedi-temple-5049593/) by Yvent - [The Battle of Geonosis](https://www.patreon.com/posts/battle-of-109546251) by TomOnMars _(💰Patreon)_ - [Battle of Kashyyyk Planetary Diorama](https://www.patreon.com/posts/battle-of-114592775) by TomOnMars _(💰Patreon)_ - [Munificent vs Venator Battle](https://www.patreon.com/posts/munificent-vs-126214512) by TomOnMars _(💰Patreon)_ - [Forest Moon of Endor Diorama](https://www.patreon.com/posts/forest-moon-of-135036654) by TomOnMars _(💰Patreon)_ - [The Battle of Crait v2](https://www.patreon.com/posts/battle-of-crait-130960605) by TomOnMars _(💰Patreon)_ - [Galaxy's Edge](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/minecraft-galaxy-s-edge) by Equinox77 - [~TATOOINE - STAR WARS~](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/streaminged-s-tatooine-map-star-wars/) by EddyFromOuterSpace - [The Battle of Christophsis (Star Wars)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/the-battle-of-christophsis/) by MinecraftMegabuilding _(💰Patreon)_ - [CORUSCANT | STAR WARS](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/coruscant-star-wars-map-miniature-v-2-revamped/) by arzwqs _(💰Patreon)_ - [Star Wars Imperial Outpost](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/star-wars-imperial-outpost-ember-builds/) by emberbuilds _(💰Patreon)_ - [Star Wars: Mandalore Adventure Map](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/star-wars-mandalore-adventure-map/) by VitivYT - [Felucia Diorama](https://www.patreon.com/posts/felucia-diorama-159078370) by TomOnMars _(💰Patreon)_

## ❓ FAQ
Q: Do I need OptiFine or CITResewn for this pack to work? A: For Minecraft version 1.20.1–1.21.4, this pack requires either OptiFine or CIT Resewn. Starting from 1.21.5, you don’t need either one, and everything works just as before.
Q: What lightsabers are in the resource pack? A: You can find all the lightsabers [here](https://github.com/JustTimmsAdditions/justtimms_lightsaber_workshop_doc/wiki) in the documentation.
Q: How does the pack structure work? A: This resource pack is multi-version compatible, so that the game uses multiple file locations, so that it only uses OptiFine CIT in 1.20.2–1.21.4 and vanilla CIT in 1.21.5+.
Q: Can I join my 1.21.5+ world in 1.21.4 or below? A: No, all lightsabers will lose their name and you will need to rename them again.
Q: What shader pack do you use? A: I used Complementary Shaders with bloom **ON** and RP Support on **SEUS PBR**.

## 🤔Terms of use You are **free** to: - Use this pack on your server. - Alter the pack for personal use. - Combine with other packs for personal use and play. - Use this pack in YouTube videos. _(Credit is appreciated)_ You are **NOT** allowed to: - Claim ownership over the textures/models in this pack. - Reupload the entire resource pack elsewhere. - Redistribute unedited individual assets from the pack without permission and credit. - Redistribute edited assets from the pack without permission and credit. Thanks in advance. --- ## 🚧 Other Projects [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/rGYl5Vu.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-enhanced-colors)
